sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى كُلِّ شَخْصٍ حِمَايَةُ خُصُوصِيَّتِهِ عَبْرَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Svaka osoba mora zaštititi svoju privatnost na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: Every person must protect their privacy online.

sentences.arabic: لَا تُشَارِكْ مَعْلُومَاتِكَ الشَّخْصِيَّةَ مَعَ الْغُرَبَاءِ أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: Nikada ne dijeli svoje lične podatke sa strancima.
sentences.translationEn: Never share your personal information with strangers.

sentences.arabic: كَلِمَاتُ الْمُرُورِ الْقَوِيَّةُ تَحْمِي حِسَابَاتِكَ مِنَ الِاخْتِرَاقِ.
sentences.translation: Jake lozinke štite tvoje račune od hakovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Strong passwords protect your accounts from hacking.
